basic_details.job_title: Ministry of Heavy Industries Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Heavy Industries has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Consultant Grade-2 Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website. The last date to apply online is 10-07-2026, so applicants are advised to submit their forms well before the deadline to avoid last-minute issues. In this article, you will find complete details about Consultant Grade-2 Recruitment 2026, including vacancy details, eligibility criteria, age limit, salary,

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. In case of retired Government servant, the ceiling of age limit may be relaxed.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters or Post Graduation from a reputed and Govt. recognized Institution or equivalent, Desirable: Masters or Post Graduate Diploma or PhD in field of Foreign Trade / International Trade, Tariff and Non-Tariff/TBT matters with interdisciplinary knowledge of Electrical, Electronic, Mechanical, Industrial Machinery Equipment and Technology and Allied products and Industry.
qualification.details: Masters or Post Graduation from a reputed and Govt. recognized Institution or equivalent. Desirable: Masters or Post Graduate Diploma or PhD in field of Foreign Trade / International Trade, Tariff and Non-Tariff/TBT matters with interdisciplinary knowledge of Electrical, Electronic, Mechanical, Industrial Machinery Equipment and Technology and Allied products and Industry.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Ministry of Heavy Industries to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Ministry of Heavy Industries Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Ministry of Heavy Industries to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Ministry of Heavy Industries Consultant Grade-2 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ministry of Heavy Industries Consultant Grade-2 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Consultant Grade-2 post is 10-07-2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant Grade-2 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters or Post Graduation from a reputed and government-recognized institution or equivalent. A Master's, Post Graduate Diploma, or PhD in Foreign Trade/International Trade is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant Grade-2 position is 50 years. Age relaxation may be applicable for retired government servants.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant Grade-2 role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,45,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant Grade-2 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Consultant Grade-2 post in the International Co-operation Division.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of the Ministry of Heavy Industries.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Consultant Grade-2 recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant Grade-2 position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant Grade-2 post will be based on an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity for the Consultant Grade-2 position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
